text.title: Go Project Structure Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply go-project-structure end-to-end.

step.name: scaffold-skeleton
step.action: Create the directory tree, go.mod, Makefile, Dockerfile.

step.name: write-vertical-slice
step.action: Write a complete CRUD slice end-to-end with tests at each layer.

step.name: audit-graceful-shutdown
step.action: Confirm srv.Shutdown + DB close + queue drain + ctx cancel order.
